  • Overview

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractDAO<T>
    AbstractDAO is a generic class that realizes CRUD operations with the database.
    Bill
    Immutable class using java records, it gives permission only to create and view.
    BillPanel
    BillPanel gets displayed when the user presses the View bills button in the SidePanel.
    Client
    Model class tha contains necessary information about clients.
    ClientBLL
    ClientBLL contains methods to add, delete, and update clients.
    ClientDAO
    Class that extends AbstractDAO class, so it can execute CRUD operations in the database with Clients.
    ClientPanel
    ClientPanel gets displayed when the user presses the Clients button in the SidePanel.
    ConnectionFactory
    ConnectionFactory contains classes that realise the connection to the MySQL database.
    Controller
    Controller class manages the logic behind the GUI.
    LogDAO
    LogDAO provides access to the database, and involves methods for inserting and viewing bills in the database.
    Main
    Orders Management system
    OrderBLL
    Order contains methods to place an order.
    OrderDAO
    Class that extends AbstractDAO class, so it can execute CRUD operations in the database with Orders.
    OrderPanel
    OrderPanel gets displayed when the user presses the Place an order button in the SidePanel.
    OrderProduct
    Model class tha contains necessary information about order-product connections.
    OrderProductDAO
    Class that extends AbstractDAO class, so it can execute CRUD operations in the database with OrderProducts.
    Orders
     
    Product
     
    ProductBLL
    ProductBLL contains methods to add, delete, and update products.
    ProductDAO
    Class that extends AbstractDAO class, so it can execute CRUD operations in the database with Products.
    ProductPanel
    ProductPanel gets displayed when the user presses the Products button in the SidePanel.
    SidePanel
    SidePanel contains buttons that let the user switch between different panels.
    View
    Class that sets up the main GUI frame, manages panels and cardLayout.
